case_title: FIA CARD SERRVICES VS. ANA ZARCENO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERRVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ZARCENO, ANA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-05-2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-25-2011 CONTINUED TO AUG-24-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERRVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZARCENO, ANA $2,442.17 PRINCIPAL, $274.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,716.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-30-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERRVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ZARCENO, ANA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-24-2011 CONTINUED TO NOV-30-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE AUG-24-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERRVICES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $274.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $3,100.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ZARCENO, ANA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERRVICES SERVED APR-14-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZARCENO, ANA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-25-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
